exemplar.title: What role does imagination play in producing knowledge about the world?

detailedExemplarData.title: What role does imagination play in producing knowledge about the world?

strengths: Clear identification of three distinct objects with a focused exhibition title setting strong context.
Well-developed analysis of the Mona Lisa, including precise real-world context, direct quotations from da Vinci, and empirical support from a Harvard study.
Consistent linking of each object to the IA prompt, with explicit discussions of imaginationâs role in generating scientific, historical, and artistic knowledge.
weaknesses: Real-world contexts for the Asimov short story and the Egyptian mummy remain vague, lacking titles, provenance, or concrete citations.
Some sections drift into descriptive background (e.g. EV benefits) rather than sustained epistemic analysis of imagination.
Insufficient academic rigor in citation: key quotations and studies are mentioned without full references or dates.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Awarding a 9 reflects performance at the very top of the 7â8 band, bordering on the 9â10 level. The student succeeds in grounding three objects in real-world settings and consistently ties each to the IA prompt, with especially strong evidence and conceptual precision in the Mona Lisa commentary. The clear title, robust quoting of Leonardo, and integration of empirical research demonstrate advanced understanding. Minor lapses in specificity for the Asimov and mummy objects, occasional over-descriptive passages, and incomplete sourcing prevent a perfect score. Overall, the exhibition exhibits excellent justification and support for how imagination functions epistemically, meriting a high mark of 9.

annotations.comment: The exhibition title is clearly presented, setting a focused context for the IA and signalling the studentâs understanding of the task.
The IA prompt is correctly stated, but restating it in the studentâs own words could demonstrate deeper initial engagement and understanding.
The word count is 966. Has the student ensured adherence to the IAâs maximum word limit? Verify compliance to avoid penalties.
The object title names Asimovâs autonomous vehicle example but omits the short storyâs title or publication year, making the real-world context imprecise.
The image is visually engaging but needs a caption specifying its sourceâsuch as the edition or cover image of the Asimov collectionâto ground it in reality.
The description lacks the title and date of Asimovâs short story, limiting specificity. Including these details would strengthen the real-world context.
This justification delves into EV benefits rather than analysing how Asimovâs imaginative vision functioned epistemically. Refocus on imaginationâs role in knowledge production.
What empirical evidence links Asimovâs fictional concept to real-world advancements in autonomous driving? Citing research would bolster the argument.
The explanation of imagination as hypothesis generation is clear and connects conceptual projection to scientific inquiry effectively.
To deepen analysis, illustrate how Asimovâs imaginative hypothesis directly influenced modern research agendas or experiments in autonomous vehicles.
Reduce descriptive detail on emission and safety to maintain focus on the prompt: discuss how imaginative foresight guided research design in autonomous vehicle development.
The object description remains conceptual rather than linked to a specific mummy or exhibit, which limits the precision of the real-world context.
Provide detailed provenance for the mummy image (e.g., museum, accession number, or excavation site) to anchor this object in a concrete real-world setting.
The phrase ârecent evidence suggestsâ is unsubstantiated; the student should cite a specific archaeological study or publication for credibility.
Incorporate a named Egyptologist or specific case study to demonstrate clearly how imagination influenced early archaeological interpretations.
Can the student specify which Victorian Egyptologists held these preservation views and how their cultural imagination shaped their conclusions?
Link the imagined religious beliefs more explicitly to TOK knowledge frameworks to deepen the analysis of how hypotheses are formed.
The summary effectively highlights imaginationâs role in reconstructing past events, showing how hypothetical explanations fill gaps in historical knowledge.
To deepen insight, describe one specific hypothetical reconstruction and how it was tested against empirical data in Egyptological research.
The Mona Lisa is clearly identified, signalling precise focus on a specific, iconic artwork for the third object.
Add a caption with the paintingâs title, date, and Louvre inventory number beneath the image to reinforce the specific real-world context.
Detailed context (creation dates and Louvre location) grounds the artwork effectively, demonstrating strong real-world specificity.
Quoting Leonardo on logic and imagination creates a direct link to the IA prompt, showing how artistic knowledge relies on both elements.
Provide a precise citation for Leonardo da Vinciâs quotation to enhance academic rigor and traceability.
The identity speculation remains largely descriptive; analyse how these imaginative interpretations generate new knowledge claims about the sitter.
Integrating the Harvard study provides empirical support, illustrating how scientific imagination explains perceptual phenomena effectively.
Include a full reference for the Harvard neuroscientistsâ 2000 study to strengthen credibility and allow readers to verify the source.
Link the imaginative interpretation to TOK ways of knowing such as perception or emotion to deepen the epistemic analysis.
Expand on how the blend of logic and imagination in the final paragraph influences viewersâ knowledge claims and deepens understanding of artistic processes.

strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
